summary:
Sterilization targets complete eradication of living organisms including resistant spore structures; thus ensuring a sterile environment by removing all microbial threats effectively. \boxed{\text{Sterilization eliminates all microbes}} To ensure thorough disinfection across different medical contexts where sterility must be guaranteed without exception for any type of pathogen or its dormant stages. 

The summary captures essential aspects while condensing Agent1’s rationale into two concise statements focusing directly on core clinical implications related to achieving absolute microbiological safety through sterilization procedures.
